Particles will have elevation and grow when they are above (Only affects new emissions if changed).
PARTICULE-FX.Settings.autoEmission.label: Automatic emission
PARTICULE-FX.Settings.autoEmission.descr: Auto-generate emissions when using an item with a target.
PARTICULE-FX.Settings.Avoid.label: Avoid particle emissions
PARTICULE-FX.Settings.Avoid.description: Don't show particles from other clients (useful for lower configurations).
PARTICULE-FX.Settings.doubleSizeElevatio: Number of elevation grids to double the size of the particles (if 0, the size doesn't change).
PARTICULE-FX.Settings.Persist.label: Save emitters
PARTICULE-FX.Settings.Persist.descriptio: Save unfinished emitters in the scene when changing. Reload them when returning to the scene.
PARTICULE-FX.Settings.minRole.label: Minimal role for custom template
PARTICULE-FX.Settings.minRole.descriptio: Minimal role required to create or delete new custom prefill templates.
PARTICULE-FX.Chat-Command.spray.help:
Projects particles from the selected source using Cartesian coordinates.
Options:
•prefillMotionTemplate: Determines the shape of the emission. One option from {prefillMotionTemplateValues}
•prefillColorTemplate: Determines the color of the emission. One option from {prefillColorTemplateValues}
• --help, -h: Displays this help message.
PARTICULE-FX.Chat-Command.missile.help:
Fires a missile from the source to the target.
Options:
•prefillMotionTemplate: Determines the shape of the emission. One option from {prefillMotionTemplateValues}
•prefillColorTemplate: Determines the color of the emission. One option from {prefillColorTemplateValues}
• --help, -h: Displays this help message.
PARTICULE-FX.Chat-Command.gravitate.help:
Generates particles around the selected source using spherical coordinates.
Options:
•prefillMotionTemplate: Determines the shape of the emission. One option from {prefillMotionTemplateValues}
•prefillColorTemplate: Determines the color of the emission. One option from {prefillColorTemplateValues}
• --help, -h: Displays this help message.
PARTICULE-FX.Chat-Command.stopAll.help:
Stops absolutely all active emitters.
Options:
• --instant, -i: Forces a stop by immediately destroying the emitted particles.
• --help, -h: Displays this help message.
PARTICULE-FX.Chat-Command.stopById.help:
Stops a specific emitter.
Options:
• --instant, -i: Forces a stop by immediately destroying the emitted particles.
•ID of the emitter to delete
• first, f: Targets the first emitter in the list.
• last, l: (Default) Targets the last emitter in the list.
• --help, -h: Displays this help message.
PARTICULE-FX.Chat-Command.stopWorkflow.h:
Stops future emissions linked to a specific emitter.
Options:
• --instant, -i: Forces a stop by immediately destroying the emitted particles.
•ID of the emitter to delete
• --all, -a: Stops all linked workflows instead of just one.
• first, f: Targets the first emitter in the list.
• last, l: (Default) Targets the last emitter in the list.
• --help, -h: Displays this help message.
PARTICULE-FX.Chat-Command.help.return: Here are the existing chat commands for particles FX:
PARTICULE-FX.Chat-Command.help.help: Lists all available commands for the Particle FX module.
PARTICULE-FX.Chat-Command.Unrecognized: Unrecognized particles FX chat command, use /pfx help
PARTICULE-FX.Emission.Title: Particle Emission
